opinion.h4: BOYD ET AL. v. CLARK, ATTORNEY GENERAL, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK. No. 490. Decided January 13, 1969.
opinion.p: Victor Rabinowitz and Leonard B. Boudin for appellants.
The judgment is affirmed, Clark v. Gabriel, ante, p. 256, without reaching the jurisdictional question raised under 28 U.S.C. 1331.
opinion.h4: MARKHAM ADVERTISING CO., INC. v. WASHINGTON, (1969)
opinion.p: MARKHAM ADVERTISING CO., INC., ET AL. v. WASHINGTON ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF WASHINGTON. No. 648. Decided January 13, 1969.
Alfred J. Schweppe and Thomas R. Beierle for appellants.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
